title: Non-record: sin² activation + causal screening pipeline
author: clthuang

data.description: Replaced ReLU² with sin² activation in MLP layers as a one-line drop-in change.
Explored a wider model configuration for faster short-training convergence.
Compared smooth activation alternatives to ReLU², including SiLU and GELU.
Explored a smaller MLP configuration with one MLP layer.
Adaptive multi-token prediction that dynamically chooses how many future tokens to predict based on confidence.
Selective loss masking that skips loss computation on tokens predicted confidently using max logit magnitude as a difficulty proxy.
Automated causal screening pipeline using causal DAG extraction, paired-seed discovery-adjust cycles, and in-process MLX experimentation.

novel_contributions: sin² activation as a drop-in replacement for ReLU² in MLP layers
Automated causal screening pipeline for intervention discovery
Adaptive multi-token prediction with variable-depth prediction
Rho-1 selective loss masking based on model confidence
In-process MLX training with warmup caching for faster experimentation
